issue_title: `cp` (and potentially other commands like `mv`) should accept both files and folders for destination argument
issue_body_preview:
<!--
  Please fill out each section below, otherwise, your issue will be closed. This info allows Fig maintainers to diagnose (and fix!) your issue as quickly as possible.

  Useful Links:
  - Documentation: https://withfig.com/docs/autocomplete/getting-started

  Before opening a new issue, p
test_description_zh: 在终端中输入 `cp` 命令，输入源文件参数后，在目标参数位置触发自动补全，观察补全建议中是否同时包含文件和文件夹选项。对 `mv` 命令执行相同操作，检查目标参数的自动补全建议。
expected_result_zh: `cp` 和 `mv` 等命令的目标参数自动补全建议中应同时显示文件和文件夹选项，用户可以选择文件或文件夹作为目标路径。
